description: This file contains utility functions for managing documentation paths, including generating versioned documentation URLs, validating their existence, and constructing filesystem paths. It also imports Node.js core modules and a local configuration module.

methods.name: getVersionedDocsPath
methods.description: Generates a versioned documentation URL based on the provided docsPath and current configuration.

methods.name: validateVersionedDocsPaths
methods.description: Checks that all generated versioned documentation paths exist on the filesystem, throwing an error if any are missing.

methods.name: getDocsRelativePath
methods.description: Returns the relative path to the docs directory for a given docsPath.

methods.name: getDocsStaticFsPath
methods.description: Returns the filesystem path to the static assets directory within the docs folder.

methods.name: getDocsPublicFsPath
methods.description: Returns the filesystem path to the public assets directory within the docs folder.

methods.name: getDocsFsPath
methods.description: Returns the absolute filesystem path to the docs directory based on the current working directory.
